arts.ttl: Three observations from Real Madrid’s 3-2 win vs Manchester City
arts.sum: Real Madrid will obviously lose something in midfield if Valverde is not there — more on that later — but they will also gain something in defense, and in some cases, that may be the deciding factor in Real Madrid’s big games this season. What if Valverde stayed as the right-back in all of Real Madrid’s big games until they signed another fullback or until Carvajal returned from injury?

arts.ttl: Manchester City fans unveil BRUTAL banner mocking Vini Jr after his Ballon d'Or snub... and injured Rodri is seen taking a picture of it!
arts.sum: Manchester City supporters have mocked Real Madrid star Vinicius Jr ahead of their Champions League clash against the Spanish giants.

arts.ttl: Managing Madrid Podcast: Manchester City 2 - 3 Real Madrid, Post-game, Champions League 2024 - 2025
arts.sum: On this episode of the Managing Madrid Podcast, Kiyan Sobhani, Lucas Navarrete, and Leah Revelle discuss: Kiyan, Lucas, and Leah break down Real Madrid’s dramatic W at the Etihad

arts.ttl: Alan Shearer blames 'unacceptable' four-minute VAR delay for injury to Jack Grealish in Man City's Champions League clash against Real Madrid
arts.sum: Grealish was a surprise inclusion in Pep Guardiola 's starting XI for the visit of the European champions on Tuesday night and he made an impact in his short time on the pitch.

arts.ttl: Ancelotti: "Everyone showed great commitment and the quality of this team is never in doubt
arts.sum: They all showed great showed great commitment today and the quality of this team is never in doubt - this is the way forward." "The result could be misleading as we don't have to come from behind in the return, but we have to approach the second leg in exactly the same way as we did today, with the same commitment and quality."

arts.ttl: Manchester City injuries: Pep Guardiola suffers double injury blow in Real Madrid Champions League defeat
arts.sum: Manchester City suffer two injury blows during their defeat against Real Madrid on Tuesday night in the Champions League, and face an uphill battle to avoid elimination.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola spotted with scratches on his head for the THIRD time this season after Manchester City's latest Champions League collapse
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola 's ugly habit reared its head once more as Manchester City suffered another collapse in the Champions League on Tuesday night.

arts.ttl: Vinicius makes clear statement over Real Madrid contract: “God willing...”
arts.sum: “It’s very exciting to be able to start discussions with Real Madrid about my contract extension. “My current deal runs until 2027, but I’ve always said I want to play here for a long time, make history, and feel the love of the fans alongside the president and coaching staff,” he stated.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid star Vinicius Jr claims banner mocking his Ballon d'Or snub inspired his match-winning performance against Man City
arts.sum: City fans unveiled a giant tifo before the dramatic 3-2 Champions League play-off first leg defeat, depicting Rodri collecting the Ballon d'Or award, with a message reading: 'Stop crying your heart out.'

arts.ttl: Man City's lack of belief and ageing team exposed by ruthless Real Madrid
arts.sum: Manchester City's lack of belief and ageing squad is exposed by ruthless Real Madrid to leave their Champions League hopes in danger, writes BBC Sport chief football writer Phil McNulty
